description:
Refactor Village's ACP integration from daemon/HTTP model to stdio-first design.

## Summary
Local ACP agents run as subprocesses communicating over stdio. Village should be directly spawnable by editors like Zed without daemon management.

## Scope
1. CLI Simplification - village acp runs stdio agent directly
2. Permission Policies - auto + policy modes
3. Model Selection - Map ACP modelId to Village LLM config
4. Session Forking - Skip (keep NotImplementedError)
5. Config Cleanup - Remove server_host/server_port
6. Documentation - Update for stdio model

## Out of Scope
- HTTP transport (add when ACP spec supports remote)
- Session forking
- Interactive permission mode

## Files
- village/cli/acp.py
- village/acp/agent.py
- village/acp/bridge.py
- village/acp/external_client.py
- village/config.py
- village/acp/permissions.py (new)
- docs/ACP_*.md
- tests/test_acp_*.py
title: ACP Refactor: Stdio-First Design
